name: Volodymyr Zelensky
quote: I need ammunition, not a ride. We will defend our country, we will be fighting. Nobody is going to break us.

name: Gen. Oleksandr Syrskyi
quote: Our task is to hold the line while building up forces for future operations. We are fighting for every meter of Ukrainian land.

name: Gen. Valerii Zaluzhnyi
role: Cmdr-in-Chief, Armed Forces of Ukraine (2021–2024); Ambassador to UK
quote: There will most likely be no deep and beautiful breakthrough. We have reached the level of technology that puts us into a stalemate.

name: Denys Shmyhal
quote: Ukraine will rebuild. Every destroyed home, every broken road, every damaged hospital is on Russia's account. We will present that bill.

name: Andriy Yermak
role: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine
quote: Ukraine has the right to defend itself on the entire territory of the aggressor state. This is international law.

name: Petro Poroshenko
quote: We are building an army. Give us weapons and we will stop Putin ourselves. Europe's security depends on Ukraine's victory.

name: Hanna Maliar
role: Deputy Minister of Defence of Ukraine
quote: The enemy is digging in deep. We are destroying their logistics, command structures, and the will to fight. The war is long but the outcome is not in doubt.

name: Vladimir Putin
quote: Modern Ukraine was entirely created by Russia or, to be more precise, by Bolshevik, Communist Russia. We are correcting these historical errors.

name: Gen. Valery Gerasimov
role: Chief of General Staff, Russian Armed Forces
quote: The Russian Armed Forces are systematically destroying the military infrastructure of the Kyiv regime. Our goals will be achieved.

name: Dmitry Medvedev
role: Deputy Chair, Russian Security Council; Former President
quote: Zelensky's dream to join NATO means World War III. Russia will use any means to protect its security, including nuclear weapons.

name: Sergei Lavrov
quote: The special military operation is proceeding according to plan. The West's escalation through arms supplies prolongs the suffering. Russia remains open to honest dialogue.

name: Ramzan Kadyrov
role: Head of the Chechen Republic; Russian military contributor
quote: Our Chechen fighters are at the forefront of every battle. We will crush the enemy wherever they hide. Victory will be ours.

name: Jens Stoltenberg
quote: Ukraine's right to self-defense is clear under international law. NATO will support Ukraine for as long as it takes. Helping Ukraine is an investment in our own security.

name: Emmanuel Macron
quote: We cannot allow Russia to win this war. Everything is on the table, including deploying Western troops if Russian lines break through. Europe must awaken to the threat.

name: Olaf Scholz
quote: Germany stands firmly with Ukraine. We have approved Leopard 2 tanks, Patriot systems, and artillery. But we must avoid escalation to direct NATO-Russia conflict.

name: Kaja Kallas
role: EU High Representative for Foreign Affairs; Former Estonian PM
quote: Those who border Russia know what Russia is. This is not just Ukraine's war — it is a war for the rules-based international order. Europe must spend more on defense now.

name: Radosław Sikorski
quote: Poland is on the front line of Europe's defense. We will not accept a Russian veto over Ukraine's choices. Poland is Europe's largest arms conduit to Ukraine.

name: Joe Biden
quote: America will stand with Ukraine as long as it takes. We will not abandon a democratic nation facing an autocrat's aggression. Putin will not prevail.

name: Donald Trump
quote: I will end this war in 24 hours before I even become president. Both sides want a deal. This should never have started — but now we need peace.

name: Antony Blinken
quote: Russia committed the fundamental breach of the UN Charter — the violent seizure of another country's territory. That cannot stand, and we will not allow it.

name: António Guterres
quote: The war in Ukraine is an earthquake with global shockwaves — the food crisis, the energy crisis, rising costs everywhere. We need peace in Ukraine for the sake of the world.

name: Rafael Grossi
role: Director General, International Atomic Energy Agency
quote: The Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant is in a precarious situation. Every one of the seven pillars of nuclear safety has been violated. This must stop.

name: Alexander Lukashenko
quote: Belarus is not at war with Ukraine, but we must stand with Russia as a union state. Belarus provided territory but not troops. We seek peace with our neighbor.

name: Viktor Orbán
quote: Hungary wants peace, not war. We will not allow our territory to be used for weapons transfers. A ceasefire now could save hundreds of thousands of lives.

name: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
quote: Turkey can play a key mediating role. We have maintained dialogue with both sides throughout. The Grain Deal showed what's possible when goodwill exists.
